sections.title: After looking at the World Map

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Well done, you have found your world map.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: The world map can show where you are in the world, as well as where other places are. You can find where you are by looking for the yellow X icon.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: You may have noticed all the icons on the map, these icons have a meaning behind each one. You can find out what the icon means by looking at the map key.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: To open or close the map key you will have to click the scroll looking icon in the bottom left part of the map.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Once opened, you will see a list of all the different icons on the map, as well as some text next to the icon telling you what the icon is. You can click on an icon in the key.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Every icon that is the same as the one you just selected, will start to flash.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Lastly, next to the key you will see there is a search bar. You can click on the search bar and type in a location. You can then press enter and the map will move to the specified location.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Now you know the basics of the world map, I am going to task you with making your way to the Quest Guide. You can find him just north of here. Go out the door to the west and follow the path.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Remember that your world map is just a larger version of your mininmap, with the difference that you can click on your minimap to navigate around. You will also see icons on your minimap as well, just like the world map.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the lesson, I'll go find the Quest Guide now.

sections.title: After finishing the Master Navigator's Tutorial

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Hey newbie, can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the world map again.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: The world map can show where you are in the world, as well as where other places are. You can find where you are by looking for the yellow X icon.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: You may have noticed all the icons on the map, these icons have a meaning behind each one. You can find out what the icon means by looking at the map key.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: To open or close the map key you will have to click the scroll looking icon in the bottom left part of the map.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Once opened, you will see a list of all the different icons on the map, as well as some text next to the icon telling you what the icon is. You can click on an icon in the key.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Every icon that is the same as the one you just selected, will start to flash.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Lastly, next to the key you will see there is a search bar. You can click on the search bar and type in a location. You can then press enter and the map will move to the specified location.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you have a meat cleaver?

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: *Sigh*

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: That's kind of a sore subject. But if you must know, I used to be a chef here on the island.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: But people thought that learning how to cook bread after cooking shrimp was useless. So now I teach players how to navigate the world instead.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to grill me on?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I'm ready to move on!

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Get moving then.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Hey newbie! I'm the Master Navigator - let's teach you how to get around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can already walk around...

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: Ha. You've worked your way around to me, but this island is bigger than you think! I will show you by teaching you how to use the world map. First things first, you will need to open your world map.

lines.speaker: Master Navigator
lines.text: You can find this in the top right side of the screen, look for the flashing globe icon.
